[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11010000 3
1 00011111 5
2 11000010 3
3 01111110 6
4 10001001 3
5 01000001 2
6 11010011 5
7 11110100 5

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 01000000 1
23 32 01000001 2 match 5
34 43 11010000 3 match 0
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 00000011 2
67 76 11000001 3
70 07 10000001 2

02 20 00000001 1
13 31 01000000 1
24 42 01000000 1
35 53 00000011 2
46 64 11100000 3
57 75 00000001 1
60 06 10000001 2
71 17 01000000 1

03 30 10010001 3
14 41 01000000 1
25 52 00000001 1
36 63 11000011 4
47 74 11000000 2
50 05 00000001 1
61 16 01001000 2
72 27 01000001 2 match 5

04 40 10010100 3
15 51 00000000 a
26 62 01000001 2 match 5
37 73 11000001 3
